items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

**Summary:** This is a documentation gap issue filed by the `update-docs` automation, noting that the `CHANGELOG.md` and `README.md` for `Azure.AI.Extensions.OpenAI` do not document the expanded OpenTelemetry tool call tracing support introduced in PR #57821. A sample for tool-call tracing is also missing.

<details>
<summary>📋 Issue Details</summary>

**Package:** `Azure.AI.Extensions.OpenAI` (unreleased `2.1.0-beta.1`)
**Affected API:** `OpenTelemetryResponseScope.cs` — tracing for tool call types in the Responses API
**Scenarios:**
- `CHANGELOG.md` `## 2.1.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)` "Features Added" section is empty despite new tracing for `code_interpreter_call`, `file_search_call`, `web_search_call`, `mcp_call`/`mcp_*` variants
- `README.md` Tracing section covers setup but not which tool types emit spans or what attributes are captured per type
- No sample code showing how tool-call spans appear in traces (current `Sample_Responses_Tracing.cs` only demonstrates a simple text-prompt trace)

**Root ask:** Update CHANGELOG and README to document the new tool-call tracing capabilities, and optionally add a tracing sample for tool calls.
</details>

<details>
<summary>🔎 Debugging / Reproduction Notes</summary>

This issue was generated automatically by the [Update Docs workflow](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/actions/runs/24105859597/agentic_workflow) after PR #57821 (commit `6990ac18d`) added tracing for additional tool call types in the Responses API. The implementation guide in the issue body provides step-by-step instructions.

**Suggested investigation steps:**
1. Review PR #57821 changes to `OpenTelemetryResponseScope.cs` and the new telemetry test files to understand what was added
2. Update `sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Extensions.OpenAI/CHANGELOG.md` under `## 2.1.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)` → Features Added with the new tool call types and their captured attributes
3. Add a "Traced tool types" subsection to the `### Tracing` section of `README.md` with the attribute table from the issue body
4. Optionally add a snippet in `Sample_Responses_Tracing.cs` demonstrating tool-call span tracing and reference it from the README
5. Validate with `dotnet build`, `dotnet test --filter TestCategory!=Live`, and `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 ai` (if a new snippet is added)
</details>

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Confidence</summary>

- **Category:** `Client` — This is an SDK client library (`Azure.AI.Extensions.OpenAI`) with a documentation/CHANGELOG gap; not a management or provisioning library
- **Service:** Undetermined — The package lives in `sdk/ai/` but has no dedicated `ServiceLabel` entry in CODEOWNERS; the closest candidates ("OpenAI" for `sdk/openai/`, "AI Model Inference" for `Azure.AI.Inference`, "AI Projects" for `Azure.AI.Projects`) do not match this package precisely
- **Confidence:** Low — Category is clear (Client), but the service label cannot be confidently determined from existing repository labels and CODEOWNERS entries; `needs-triage` applied for manual review
</details>
